name: job-application-suite
description: Apply to a bounded set of jobs with verified browser, email, tracker, and local credential workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Apply to jobs with guarded automation
interface.longDescription: Run bounded job-application batches with verified role selection, Gmail-assisted confirmations, Chrome control, duplicate prevention, and passwords stored in the local operating-system vault.
defaultPrompt: Apply to five matching jobs and review exceptions with me.
